creator: michael@brokendns.net
text:
This mass commit (r484599) seems to have broken the build of security/pam_ssh_agent_auth.

However, it builds and runs just fine against openssl111, so it should not be marked BROKEN.  The openssl111 build was fixed on October 21, 2018.

Removing the BROKEN_SSL variable from the Makefile makes it build and run normally.
